games.name: The Wizard Green Skibidis Fury
games.description: The green wizard in a parallel universe now escapes from the Skibidi toilet! Quickly! Find the exit! Le sorcier vert dun univers parall&amp;egrave;le s&amp;eacute;chappe des toilettes de Skibidi ! Vite ! Trouvez la sortie ! Il mago verde in un universo parallelo &amp;egrave; scappato dal bagno degli Skibidi! Presto! Trovate luscita!
games.instructions: Use AWSD or touch for move

games.name: Labubu World Game
games.description: Labubu World is a fun and quirky adventure game that brings the mischievous character Labubu to life in a colorful, whimsical world. Players step into a universe full of surprises, where every stage is packed with unique challenges, hidden treasures, and playful creatures. In this game, you guide Labubu through vibrant levels, jumping across platforms, solving puzzles, and avoiding tricky obstacles. Each world has its own theme and personality&amp;mdash;whether it&amp;rsquo;s enchanted forests, mysterious caves, or candy-colored skies. Collect items along the way to unlock new abilities and customize your Labubu with fun outfits.

games.name: Snake Game 2025
games.description: Classic Snake Game &amp;ndash; HTML5 + Responsive + Touch Support Bring back the nostalgia with this modern take on the classic Snake Game, built entirely with HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript. Lightweight, fast, and fully responsive, this game runs smoothly across all modern browsers and devices.
games.instructions: Control the snake using the arrow keys or W A S D keys Eat the food grow longer and avoid crashing into the walls or yourself

games.name: Fishdom
games.description: Dive into the fantastic world of Fishdom! Youre in for an ocean of exciting levels, scores of adorable fish and pets, and a sea of captivating events! Explore incredible underwater adventures! Unlock aquariums and save the fish on every level.
games.instructions: Use the mouse or touch to play

games.name: Something below the Sea Hard version
games.description: A team of scientists spotted an area of the planet with an immense amount of garbage, seeing that this threatened marine life, they decided to create drones to remove this garbage, but something else is hidden...
games.instructions: Use ASDW for move or Touch and shoot with P ou Touch the square for shoot

games.name: Tralalero Tralala Endless Run
games.description: Tralalero Tralala Endless Run is a colorful and exciting online game that kids will love. The challenge is simple but addictive: stay alive for as long as possible while running endlessly through a quirky world full of surprises. Your goal is to jump on jellyfish to keep moving forward and collect as many delicious burgers as you can along the way. The more burgers you gather, the higher your score will climb. But watch out: crashing into the top or bottom of the screen will quickly end your run. This fast-paced adventure is all about quick reflexes, timing, and endless fun. Perfect for kids who enjoy bright graphics, silly characters, and non-stop action. Best of all, it is completely free to play online, so you can jump right into the excitement anytime. So, get ready to guide Tralalero Tralala through this hilarious endless journey, collect those burgers, and see how long you can survive. Can you set a new record? Give it a try and have fun!
games.instructions: Left and right arrow keys or mouse to play

games.name: Tung Tung Sahur in Geometry Dash
games.description: Join Tung Tung Sahur, the wooden drum-carrying dawn caller, as he bounces and flips through a neon cityscape just before sunrise! Dodge spikes, leap over traps, and time your jumps to the beat of his signature &amp;ldquo;tung-tung!&amp;rdquo; calls. In this Geometry Dash&amp;ndash;inspired challenge, the streets are alive with glowing gates, speed pads, and tricky gravity flips. Can you drum your way to the end without missing a beat?

games.name: Alex Whiskers
games.description: Join Alex Whiskers, the adventurous town cat, on a fast-paced hunt for tasty fish! Dash through busy streets, bounce high on springs, dodge speeding cars, and stay clear of the big bad bulldogs who&amp;rsquo;d love to stop you in your tracks. Quick paws and sharp reflexes are your best friends in this fun, action-packed 3D adventure.
games.instructions: Controls Move Arrow Keys or WASD Look Around Mouse left right Jump Spacebar Controller Support Fully compatible for movement camera and jumping

games.name: Safari Match
games.description: Play Safari Match, a fun and addictive match-3 puzzle game set in the heart of the wild safari! Match colorful animal blocks, solve exciting puzzles, and unlock powerful boosters to win. Easy to play yet challenging to master, with hundreds of fun levels and stunning graphics. Perfect for kids and adults who love brain games, block puzzles, and animal-themed adventures. Play anywhere&amp;mdash;mobile, tablet, or desktop&amp;mdash;and become the ultimate match-3 champion!
games.instructions: Desktop Mouse Click Select amp Match Blocks Mobile Tap Select amp Match Blocks

games.name: Jungle Fury Mutant Rhino Mayhem
games.description: Enter a jungle plagued by mutant rhino warriors! As a brave tribal hero, rescue captured villagers, battle fierce enemies, and defeat powerful rhino bosses. Use bows, axes, and legendary weapons from the Blacksmith Shop to fight through deadly swamps, chaotic caverns, and fortified ramparts. Can you stop the Apex Mutant Rhino Warlord and restore peace to the land? Key Features: 20 intense levels with thrilling boss fights Unique enemies, from Rhino Brutes to Vampire Bats Powerful weapons like the Thunder Hammer &amp;amp; Lightning Sword Blacksmith Shop for upgrades and new gear Health herbs &amp;amp; gold mushrooms to aid your quest Epic medieval setting
games.instructions: Move attack and jump to defeat enemies Rescue villagers to complete levels Upgrade weapons wisely

games.name: School Stories: Teacher Sim
games.description: Dive into School Stories: Teacher Sim, an addictive high school game where you become a teacher managing students and school life. Customize your teacher avatar, grade papers, and maintain discipline by catching clever cheaters using hidden phones or notes. Explore vibrant school areas like art rooms, basketball courts, and swimming pools while engaging in mini games that capture the full school experience. Perfect for fans of teacher and school simulators, this game challenges your management skills as you pass levels and unlock new activities. Whether youre enforcing rules or taking part in school life adventures, School Stories: Teacher
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Tung Tung Tung Tung Sahur
games.description: Enter a dark, eerie forest haunted by the mysterious Tung Sahur. Your goal is to collect all the lost souls scattered across the woods to escape&amp;hellip; but beware! Tung Sahur appears suddenly to hunt you down. The only way to survive is to hide inside the wooden huts until its safe. Can you gather all the souls before he catches you?
games.instructions: On PC Move WASD or Arrow Keys Look Around Move the mouse Run Hold Shift while moving Interact Press E to pick up items Press ESC to unlock the cursor On Mobile Move Use the Joystick Look Around Drag your finger on the screen Run Tap and hold th

games.name: AgeOfBattle
games.description: Send troops to break through the enemys castle. Killing soldiers can earn you gold coins, and gold coins can unlock higher-level soldiers. The higher the soldiers rank is, the more powerful he is. Come and have a try.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Tarcat
games.description: Paw Smash - Cat power in a single tap! Enter the world of feline destruction with Tarcat, a hilarious casual game where you control a cats paw! Your goal? Smash all targets with quick reflexes and pinpoint accuracy! With just one tap, hit targets, avoid traps, and dominate each level with the style of a true feline destroyer.

games.name: One Level Stickman Jailbreak
games.description: Tommy got into trouble! Our hero is behind bars. But he&amp;rsquo;s not going to stay in jail for a long time and he decides to escape. Tommy steals a key and gets out of the jail cell. In order to go free Tommy will have to solve logical puzzles and you can help him in this!
games.instructions: Use the keyboard or mobile buttons to play

games.name: Meteor Escape
games.description: Meteors are raining from the sky, and so is money! Can you dodge destruction and get rich at the same time? Move fast, survive longer, and collect those coins like your life depends on it &amp;mdash; because it does!
games.instructions: PC Move Left ndash A or larr Move Right ndash D or rarr Mobile Tap the left or right buttons on the screen to move

games.name: ShapeHavoc3D
games.description: Move the tablet forward. Randomly shaped obstacles will appear ahead. Before the tablet reaches the obstacle, click on the tablet to transform it into the shape of the obstacle. It greatly tests your hand speed and is extremely thrilling. Come and give it a try.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Marble Spiral
games.description: Target the same color ball and smash the same color ball. Your goal is to match 3 or more marbles of the same color to destroy them and earn points. Prevent the marbles from reaching the end or youll lose a life.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
